description: Major UX overhaul: liquid glass SwiftUI, personalized start page with learned insights, search analytics, updated chrome extension + userscript, OpenAPI/Scalar developer docs

stories.title: OpenAPI 3.1 spec for the Phoenix Expertise API
stories.description: Write openapi.yaml covering all /api/* endpoints (search, ask, stats, health, taxonomy, resources, scan, import, scrape-images, ingest). Include request/response schemas, examples, error shapes.

stories.title: Scalar API reference hosted at /docs
stories.description: Integrate Scalar CDN into the Phoenix app. Mount at /docs route serving the OpenAPI spec with interactive try-it-out. Dark theme. Add CORS for local dev.

stories.title: Search analytics tracking + SQLite schema
stories.description: Add search_history and user_preferences tables to expertise.db. Phoenix endpoints: POST /api/analytics/search, POST /api/analytics/interaction, GET /api/analytics/top-queries, GET /api/analytics/recommendations, GET /api/analytics/preferences. Python database.py analytics commands. SwiftUI APIClient sends analytics on each search/ask.
acceptanceCriteria: search_history table created on db init
user_preferences table created on db init
POST /api/analytics/interaction logs result clicks and dwell

stories.title: SwiftUI Liquid Glass material redesign
stories.description: Apply liquid glass design language to all views: SearchView header uses .ultraThinMaterial, ResultCard uses .regularMaterial with glass border, InsightsPanelCard uses tinted glass, toolbar uses .bar material. Smooth spring animations on all state transitions. Follow swiftui-expert best practices.
acceptanceCriteria: Glass border effect on ResultCard and InsightsPanelCard
Spring animations on panel open/close, mode switch, stats toggle
No visual regression on dark/light mode

stories.title: Personalized Start Page with hand-picked insights
stories.description: New StartPageView shown when query is empty. Shows: (1) For You section with top 5 posts by engagement + user preference score, (2) Trending section with posts gaining traction, (3) Recent Searches chips for quick re-query, (4) Discover section with random high-value unseen posts. Powered by analytics endpoints from US-003. Uses liquid glass cards from US-004.
acceptanceCriteria: StartPageView renders when query is empty
For You section shows top 5 personalized recommendations
Trending section shows 3 posts with rising engagement
Recent Searches chips fire search on tap
Discover section shows 3 random unseen high-value posts
Liquid glass card design for each section

stories.title: Preference learning model from search behavior
stories.description: Track which results users click, dwell time proxy, quick-ask chip usage, taxonomy category affinity. Store as weighted topic preferences in user_preferences. Preferences decay over time (half-life 30 days). Search results re-ranked by preference. Powers Start Page For You section.
acceptanceCriteria: Tracks query topics, result clicks, dwell time, category affinity
Search results re-ranked by preference score

stories.title: Chrome extension v4 - full server integration
stories.description: Chrome Manifest V3 extension with: popup search/ask UI, background service worker for health monitoring, context menu Send to Expertise Vault for selected text, options page for server URL, badge showing server status (green/red). Supports all /api/* endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Popup UI with search and ask modes
Context menu integration for selected text
Options page with server URL config

stories.title: Userscript v4 - server sync + analytics
stories.description: Update claude-expertise-scraper.user.js to v4.0: sync with all server endpoints, auto-detect server status, support analytics endpoints, settings panel with server URL + API key config, batch export with progress indicator.
acceptanceCriteria: Server health check on script load
Settings panel with server URL config

stories.title: Phoenix LiveView refresh - glass theme + new routes
stories.description: Update LiveView UI to match liquid glass aesthetic. Add routes: GET /docs (Scalar), GET /api/openapi.yaml, analytics endpoints. Update DaisyUI theme with glass/frosted effects. Ensure Mermaid diagram support preserved.
